experiences: Engineered high-concurrency backend services to orchestrate data flows between third-party APIs and internal data stores, optimizing retrieval logic to cut average query latency from 1.2 seconds to 480ms.

Designed and implemented a scalable search infrastructure handling 25,000+ documents, optimizing database indexing and vector storage strategies to maintain sub-450ms response times for production traffic.
Built automated MLOps pipelines on AWS SageMaker to fine-tune Llama foundation models using QLoRA, reducing GPU memory usage by 14GB while adapting models to 45,000+ datasets.
Developed a comprehensive automated testing suite to benchmark system reliability, eliminating 40+ potential production regressions prior to deployment through rigorous acceptance testing.

Engineered a secure multi-tenant provisioning system using AWS S3 and Bedrock to successfully onboard 20 lawyers, automating resource allocation to slash setup time from 20 minutes to under 5 seconds while enforcing strict data isolation.

Developed a trade reconciliation engine to automatically synchronize internal ledgers with external clearing house reports, programmatically resolving data discrepancies and eliminating 100+ annual compliance breaks.

Engineered an automated lifecycle management service that identifies and purges stale transactions exceeding 30 days via asynchronous background processing, reducing manual audit overhead by 75% while maintaining strict regulatory logs.

Architected a hybrid-cloud disaster recovery solution, migrating 500GB/month of on-prem financial records to AWS S3 with lifecycle policies, ensuring 99.99% data durability and meeting 14-year retention compliance standards.
Implemented a distributed messaging layer using IBM MQ to decouple the SMAC monolith from 5 external banking partners, increasing message throughput and achieving 99.8% system availability.

Refactored legacy transaction processing modules to support multi-currency architecture including GBP and EUR, enabling global market expansion and facilitating 12,000+ additional annual cross-border settlements.

As the Students of Color Outreach Coordinator, I focus on fostering an inclusive community by directly engaging with and supporting students of color. My responsibilities include gathering and analyzing demographic data to better understand our student population, keeping campus communities informed by updating TV monitors with relevant content, and conducting outreach through emails and social media to ensure students of color feel connected, supported, and heard. Through these efforts, I strive to create an environment that embraces diversity and supports the unique experiences of every student.
